title: Crypto Asset
description: Snapshot of market data for a cryptocurrency or digital asset.

token_name.description: Full name of the token or cryptocurrency. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, exchange listing.

token_symbol.description: Ticker symbol of the token (e.g., BTC, ETH). Commonly found in: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, exchange listing.

coingecko_id.description: CoinGecko identifier for the asset. Commonly found in: CoinGecko API.

contract_address.description: Smart contract address for the token. Commonly found in: blockchain explorer, CoinGecko.

blockchain.description: Blockchain network where the token resides. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, blockchain explorer.

price_usd.description: Current price in USD. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, exchange API.

price_change_24h_pct.description: Price change percentage over the last 24 hours. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap.

price_change_7d_pct.description: Price change percentage over the last 7 days. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap.

market_cap_usd.description: Market capitalization in USD. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap.

market_cap_rank.description: Global market cap rank. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap.

volume_24h_usd.description: 24-hour trading volume in USD. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, exchange.

circulating_supply.description: Number of tokens currently in circulation. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap.

total_supply.description: Total token supply. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, token contract.

max_supply.description: Maximum possible token supply. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, whitepaper.

fully_diluted_valuation_usd.description: Fully diluted valuation (FDV) in USD. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap.

ath_usd.description: All-time high price in USD. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap.

ath_date.description: Date of all-time high price. Commonly found in: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap.

category.description: Asset category (e.g., DeFi, Layer 1, stablecoin). Commonly found in: CoinGecko categories, CoinMarketCap tags.

snapshot_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the price snapshot. Commonly found in: API response timestamp.

source_url.description: URL of the source page. Commonly found in: CoinGecko asset page, CoinMarketCap asset page.

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was extracted. Commonly found in: scraper metadata.
